chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْحُبْلَى الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ نَفَقَتِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Waiting period of the pregnant woman widowed from her husband, and her expenses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/196)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/196)
text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْفُضَيْلِ عَنْ أَبِي الصَّبَّاحِ الْكِنَانِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي الْمَرْأَةِ الْحَامِلِ الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا هَلْ لَهَا نَفَقَةٌ قَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Ja’far Bin Sama’at, and Ali Bin Khalid Al Aqouly, from Karram, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> – similar to it’.
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, form Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the pregnant woman widowed from her husband, are there expenses for her?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a pregnant widow if she has the right for maintenance. He (the Imam) said, ’No, she does not have such right.’”
